percent._code: var c = Number((data.enterpriseAsset || {}).purchasePrice) || 0; var b = Number(data.bookValue) || 0; return c > 0 ? Math.round((b / c) * 100) : 0;

components.label: Alert1
components.text: GRAP straight-line depreciation. Next monthly run scheduled 30 Jun 2026; disclosure feeds the asset note & movement schedule.

components.label: Alert2
components.text: No verification existed on this asset prior to the 2026 count — the LOGIS migration carried a blank verification date (100% of the estate). This is the first physical verification on record.
